title: logformatter: run on system tests & bindings
body:
(that got accidentally dropped in the new Cirrus makeover).

Also, make logformatter work better in the new Cirrus setup.
Remove duplicate test/subtest, remove no-longer-used SPECIALMODE,
and make the Cirrus build/task display a little cleaner.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

It took a few iterations, but logformatter is now working for [bindings](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6480648930066432/html/bindings-podman-fedora-32-root-host.log.html) and [system tests](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6093620837089280/html/sys-remote-fedora-31-rootless-host.log.html).
